sentences.arabic: حِمَايَةُ الْخُصُوصِيَّةِ أَمْرٌ ضَرُورِيٌّ عِنْدَ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Zaštita privatnosti je neophodna stvar prilikom korištenja interneta.
sentences.translationEn: Protecting privacy is essential when using the internet.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَنْشُرْ مَعْلُومَاتِكَ الشَّخْصِيَّةَ لِلْغُرَبَاءِ أَبَدًا.
sentences.translation: Nikada ne objavljuj svoje lične podatke strancima.
sentences.translationEn: Never publish your personal information to strangers.

sentences.arabic: اِخْتَرْ كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةً لِحِسَابَاتِكَ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Odaberi jake lozinke za svoje digitalne račune.
sentences.translationEn: Choose strong passwords for your digital accounts.
